response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-03:19: Identified as 'I Like It!' (Blue Archive/Mitsukiyo). Performer: Fuwamoco. Lyrics found. 2. 03:20-05:03: Identified as 'Je t'aime ★ Je t'aime' (Tommy february6). Lyrics found via query. Performer: Fuwamoco. 3. JSON constructed.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance by Fuwawa and Mococo Abyssgard. They sing "I Like It!" (originally by Mitsukiyo from Blue Archive) followed by "Je t'aime ★ Je t'aime" (originally by Tommy february6).

scenes.description: The video begins with Fuwawa and Mococo Abyssgard performing 'I Like It!' on a stage with colorful decorations.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ちょっといつもと違う道曲がったって
きっと平凡はなんにも変わらない
そう思ってたのは私だけですか?
もしかしなくてもそうみたい
偶然と必然がめぐり逢っちゃって
ぐるぐる回りだす
大好きなものをぜんぶ叫びたい
明日をひとつもあきらめない
もう少しだけ勇気を出して今
前へ進んでゆきたいから
あとほんのちょっとだけそばにいてください
待って!ペロロ様のゲリラライブの情報
どうしよう今すぐ出れば後半だけでも間に合う?
こうしてはいられないですよ
テストなんてもなんとかなります
全力で駆けつけます
大好きだという心が
わたしを平凡から抜け出させる
絶対大好きのためなら
なんだってできちゃう気がします
可愛さと魅力ぜんぶ伝えたい
どうしようもなくあふれる想い
好きなものさえあればどんな時も
かならず乗り越えられるから
あとほんのちょっとだけ話聞いてください
大好きなものがうんとう出来ました
もれなくひとつも譲れません
笑顔と好きとで紡ぐ物語
ずっと続けると決めました
とても平々凡々で至らない私ですが
あとほんのちょっとだけそばにいてください
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Even if I take a different path than usual
Surely my ordinary life won't change at all
Was I the only one who thought that?
It seems that's not the case
Coincidence and inevitability have met
And begin to spin around
I want to shout out everything I love
I won't give up on tomorrow at all
I'll muster just a little more courage now
Because I want to keep moving forward
Please stay by my side for just a little longer
Wait! Information on Peroro-sama's guerrilla live
What should I do? If I leave now, can I still make it for the second half?
I can't just stay here like this
Tests will somehow work out
I will run to you with all my might
The heart that says I love it
Lets me break out of my ordinary self
If it's for the sake of what I absolutely love
I feel like I can do anything
I want to convey all my cuteness and charm
Feelings that overflow uncontrollably
As long as I have things I love, at any time
I will surely be able to overcome them
Please listen to me for just a little longer
I've found so many things I love
I won't yield a single one of them
A story woven with smiles and love
I decided to keep it going forever
I'm very ordinary and lacking, but
Please stay by my side for just a little longer
